last_completed_round.direction_name: Retune PTX Hot-Band Group Traversal Around The 6-Row Window
last_completed_round.hypothesis: The move from the regressed non-PTX sibling back to the PTX microkernel recovered DRAM and runtime, so the live opportunity is now inside the grouped-row mapping itself rather than in broad kernel-family swaps. Keeping the mid-width 6-row window but changing how `physical_pid` is translated into `logical_block_x/logical_block_y` should preserve the recovered memory locality while reducing the residual long-scoreboard cost that still trails the earlier PTX baseline.
